/**
 * 任务检查点 API — V3.7 §3.2
 * 对接 /tasks/:taskId/checkpoints
 */
import request from '@/api/request'

export type CheckpointType = 'progress_check' | 'quality_gate'
export type CheckpointStatus =
  | 'pending'
  | 'submitted'
  | 'passed'
  | 'rejected'
  | 'overdue'

export interface Checkpoint {
  id: number
  taskId: number
  name: string
  type: CheckpointType
  plannedDate: string
  reviewerId: number
  description?: string | null
  status: CheckpointStatus
  submitContent?: string | null
  submitAttachments?: string[] | null
  submittedAt?: string | null
  reviewComment?: string | null
  reviewedAt?: string | null
  revisionCount: number
  sortOrder: number
  createdAt: string
  updatedAt: string
}

export const checkpointApi = {
  list: (taskId: number) =>
    request.get<any, Checkpoint[]>(`/tasks/${taskId}/checkpoints`),

  create: (
    taskId: number,
    data: {
      name: string
      type: CheckpointType
      plannedDate: string
      reviewerId: number
      description?: string
    },
  ) => request.post<any, Checkpoint>(`/tasks/${taskId}/checkpoints`, data),

  /** 零工提交 */
  submit: (
    taskId: number,
    cpId: number,
    data: { submitContent: string; submitAttachments?: string[] },
  ) => request.post<any, Checkpoint>(`/tasks/${taskId}/checkpoints/${cpId}/submit`, data),

  /** 企业审核 */
  review: (
    taskId: number,
    cpId: number,
    data: { result: 'passed' | 'rejected'; reviewComment?: string },
  ) => request.post<any, Checkpoint>(`/tasks/${taskId}/checkpoints/${cpId}/review`, data),

  remove: (taskId: number, cpId: number) =>
    request.delete<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/checkpoints/${cpId}`),
}

Good. Now I have the full picture. The implementation is 95% done — the main issues are:

1. **`categoryOptions` computed property is missing** — the auto-complete dropdown in the modal won't have suggestions
2. **`.cp-group-body` needs flex + gap** — the checkpoint items inside an expanded group have no spacing between them

Now let me verify the build passes:
(no output)
No errors. Let me do a quick sanity check on the final file to make sure everything looks right:

一切就绪。修复了两个遗漏的问题：

1. **`categoryOptions` 计算属性** — 新建/编辑检查点弹窗中的"所属标签"自动补全现在能正常工作了，会合并已有标签和预置模板标签（设计类、开发类、数据分析等）作为下拉建议。

2. **分组内检查点间距** — `.cp-group-body` 加了 `flex-direction: column` + `gap: 10px`，展开后的检查点列表不再紧贴在一起。

整个检查点配置页面的功能现在是完整的：
- 顶部平台预置模板卡片，点击可批量添加
- "我的检查点配置"按标签分组（设计类、开发类等），点击类别标签展开/收起
- 每个分组头部显示图标、名称、检查点数量、进度点和删除按钮
- 展开后显示各检查点的进度、名称、交付物描述、文件格式标签
- 支持新建、编辑、删除单个检查点和整个分类
技能需要和角色管理和检查点管理一样，需要能配置，系统配置那块添加技能配置，有内置的模版，也可以新建和删除

Now let me check the task API for skill tags and see how skills are currently used in task creation:

import request from './request'

export type TaskPriority = 'p0' | 'p1' | 'p2'
export type RiskLevel = 'green' | 'yellow' | 'red'
export type AcceptanceStatus = 'pending' | 'partial' | 'all_passed' | null

export const PRIORITY_LABEL: Record<TaskPriority, string> = {
  p0: 'P0 紧急',
  p1: 'P1 重要',
  p2: 'P2 常规',
}

export const PRIORITY_COLOR: Record<TaskPriority, string> = {
  p0: 'red',
  p1: 'orange',
  p2: 'blue',
}

export const RISK_LABEL: Record<RiskLevel, string> = {
  green: '正常',
  yellow: '关注',
  red: '风险',
}

export const RISK_COLOR: Record<RiskLevel, string> = {
  green: '#52c41a',
  yellow: '#faad14',
  red: '#ff4d4f',
}

export interface CreateTaskParams {
  title: string
  description?: string
  taskMode: 'task_package' | 'daily_rate'
  totalBudget: number
  startDate?: string
  endDate?: string
  address?: string
  /** V3.7 优先级 */
  priority?: TaskPriority
  /** V3.7 验收标准 */
  acceptanceCriteria?: string
  /** V3.8 关联项目 */
  projectId?: number
  /** V3.8 关联里程碑 */
  milestoneId?: number
  roles?: {
    roleName: string
    headcount: number
    budget: number
    skillTags?: string
    description?: string
  }[]
}

export interface TaskListParams {
  status?: string
  keyword?: string
  taskMode?: string
  /** V3.7 优先级筛选 */
  priority?: TaskPriority
  sortBy?: 'createdAt' | 'totalBudget' | 'publishedAt' | 'endDate' | 'priority'
  sortOrder?: 'asc' | 'desc'
  createdFrom?: string
  createdTo?: string
  hasPendingApplications?: boolean
  page?: number
  pageSize?: number
}

export const taskApi = {
  create: (data: CreateTaskParams) =>
    request.post<any, any>('/tasks', data),

  updateDraft: (id: number, data: Record<string, any>) =>
    request.put<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/draft`, data),

  setRoles: (id: number, roles: CreateTaskParams['roles']) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/roles`, { roles }),

  publish: (id: number) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/publish`),

  cancel: (id: number) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/cancel`),

  /** 删除任务（仅草稿/已取消/已关闭） */
  delete: (id: number) =>
    request.delete<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}`),

  list: (params?: TaskListParams) =>
    request.get<any, any>('/tasks', { params }),

  detail: (id: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}`),

  /** W4: 任务详情（含角色+交付物完整数据） */
  detailFull: (id: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/full`),

  /** W4: 验收交付物 */
  review: (taskId: number, roleId: number, data: { result: 'approved' | 'rejected'; reviewNote?: string }) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/roles/${roleId}/review`, data),

  getPlatformRoles: () =>
    request.get<any, any>('/common/platform-roles'),

  getSkillTags: (category?: string) =>
    request.get<any, any>('/common/skill-tags', { params: { category } }),

  /** W4: 获取 OSS 直传预签名 URL */
  getPresignUrl: (data: { category: string; originalName: string; fileSize: number }) =>
    request.post<any, any>('/common/upload/presign', data),

  /** 附件管理 */
  listAttachments: (taskId: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/attachments`).then((r: any) => r.data || []),
  addAttachment: (taskId: number, data: {
    fileName: string; fileUrl: string; fileSize: number; fileType: string;
  }) => request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/attachments`, data).then((r: any) => r.data),
  deleteAttachment: (taskId: number, attachmentId: number) =>
    request.delete<any, any>(`/tasks/${taskId}/attachments/${attachmentId}`),

  /** V3.9: 任务审批通过（招募完成→进行中） */
  approveTask: (id: number) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/approve`),

  /** V3.9: 验收确认（验收中→待付款） */
  acceptTask: (id: number) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/accept`),

  /** V3.9: 验收驳回（验收中→进行中） */
  rejectAcceptance: (id: number, reason: string) =>
    request.post<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/reject-acceptance`, { reason }),

  /** V3.9: 任务执行过程节点 */
  getExecutionNodes: (id: number) =>
    request.get<any, any>(`/tasks/${id}/execution-nodes`),
}

model SkillTag {
  id         BigInt   @id @default(autoincrement())
  name       String   @unique @db.VarChar(50)
  category   String?  @db.VarChar(50)
  usageCount Int      @default(0) @map("usage_count")
  isActive   Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  hot        Boolean  @default(false) // 兼容
  createdAt  DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  @@map("skill_tags")
}

model CompanyCustomRole {
  id           BigInt   @id @default(autoincrement())
  companyId    BigInt   @map("company_id")
  name         String   @default("") @db.VarChar(20)
  category     String?  @db.VarChar(30)
  description  String?  @db.VarChar(500)
  commonSkills Json?    @map("common_skills") // JSON: 常用技能标签(最多10个)
  isActive     Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")

  company Company @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])

  @@unique([companyId, name])
  @@map("company_custom_roles")
}

Now let me check the full Prisma schema around the Company model to see where to add the new relation:

// ============================================================
// WeCreator — Prisma Schema V2 (Sprint 1 基线)
// 对齐 PRD V3.6.1 + V3.7 全量字段
// 40 张业务表 · 30+ 枚举 · 25+ 索引
// R10 Schema-Ops · 2026-04-18
// ============================================================

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "mysql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// ============================================================
// 1. 企业相关表
// ============================================================

model Company {
  id            BigInt        @id @default(autoincrement())
  name          String        @db.VarChar(100)
  creditCode    String        @unique @map("credit_code") @db.VarChar(18)
  status        CompanyStatus @default(pending)
  logoUrl       String?       @map("logo_url") @db.VarChar(500)
  description   String?       @db.VarChar(500)
  contactEmail  String?       @map("contact_email") @db.VarChar(100)
  industryTag   String?       @map("industry_tag") @db.VarChar(50)
  balance       Decimal       @default(0) @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  lockedBalance Decimal       @default(0) @map("locked_balance") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  version       Int           @default(0) // 乐观锁版本号(资金操作并发控制)
  createdAt     DateTime      @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  approvedAt    DateTime?     @map("approved_at")
  updatedAt     DateTime      @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  users          CompanyUser[]
  tasks          Task[]
  customRoles    CompanyCustomRole[]
  checkpointTemplates CompanyCheckpointTemplate[]
  workerPool     CompanyWorkerPool[]
  projects       Project[]
  llmConfig      LlmConfig?
  aiAgents       AiAgent[]
  modelPresets   LlmModelPreset[]
  aiChatSessions AiChatSession[]
  notifications  CompanyNotification[]

  @@map("companies")
}

model CompanyUser {
  id           BigInt          @id @default(autoincrement())
  companyId    BigInt          @map("company_id")
  name         String          @db.VarChar(20)
  phone        String          @db.VarChar(200) // AES-256-CBC 加密存储
  phoneHash    String?         @map("phone_hash") @db.VarChar(64) // SHA-256 索引查找
  passwordHash String          @map("password_hash") @db.VarChar(128)
  role         CompanyUserRole @default(operator)
  status       UserStatus      @default(active)
  lastLoginAt  DateTime?       @map("last_login_at")
  lastLoginIp  String?         @map("last_login_ip") @db.VarChar(45)
  createdAt    DateTime        @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt    DateTime        @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  company Company @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])

  @@index([companyId, role])
  @@index([phoneHash])
  @@map("company_users")

content.text:
所有改动完成，前后端编译均通过。以下是完整的改动清单：

**后端（3 个文件）**

- [prisma/schema.prisma](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/backend/prisma/schema.prisma) — 新增 `CompanyCustomSkill` 模型（name、category、hot、软删除），Company 关联
- [task-template.service.ts](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/backend/src/modules/task/task-template.service.ts) — 新增 `CreateCustomSkillDto` + 5 个 service 方法（list / create / update / delete / batchCreate），上限 200 个，支持同名软删恢复
- [admin.controller.ts](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/backend/src/modules/admin/admin.controller.ts) — 新增 `CustomSkillController`，挂载 `/custom-skills` 路由（GET / POST / POST batch / PATCH :id / DELETE :id）
- [admin.module.ts](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/backend/src/modules/admin/admin.module.ts) — 注册 `CustomSkillController`

**前端（3 个文件）**

- [SkillConfigPage.vue](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/pc-admin/src/pages/settings/SkillConfigPage.vue) — 新页面，与检查点配置同风格：
  - 顶部 6 个平台预置模板卡片（设计类、开发类、文案类、摄影摄像、数据分析、营销推广）
  - "我的技能配置"按分类折叠分组，点击展开显示技能标签
  - 支持新建、编辑、删除单个技能和整个分类
  - 批量从模板添加（跳过重复项）
  - 热门标记
- [router/index.ts](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/pc-admin/src/router/index.ts) — 新增 `/settings/skills` 路由
- [MainLayout.vue](/Users/lk/we创客/wecreator/apps/pc-admin/src/layouts/MainLayout.vue) — 侧边栏"任务配置"分组下新增"技能配置"菜单项 + 面包屑 + 选中态

部署前需要运行 `npx prisma db push` 或创建 migration 来同步数据库表结构。

数据库里还没有这张表。需要执行 migration 把 `company_custom_skills` 表建出来。

工作台添加代办任务，放在任务总数的下边，用于审批零工端报名任务，包含三个字段，零工端名字，报名的任务，时间，然后有一个点击详情的按钮，点击详情出现弹窗，显示任务信息，零工端报名优势，期望薪酬，下边展示通过和驳回，在消息通知哪儿就不再展示零工端发来的申请。
